eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: North Dakota; at 3:23 PM on FEB 23, 2019 Effective until 4:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A Silver Alert is being issued at the request of Jamestown Police Department.  Maryette Jo Ost of Jamestown, ND is a 59-year-old White Female.  She has Grey hair and is 5 foot 5 inches tall, weighs 230 pounds and has Brown eyes.  She was last seen leaving her Assisted Living Facility on 2/22/19 at about 2 pm in Jamestown ND.  She is believed to be driving a 2007 Blue Chevy Malibu License Plate 863AXN.

Additional information: Wearing purple hooded coat, blue jeans and black shoes

If you have any information regarding this incident, please contact Jamestown Police Dept. at 701-252-1000.

The above Silver Alert information is available to the public by calling 5 1 1 and at www.ndresponse.gov/alert
